chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1185 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For hearing of main case 17-11-2022 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for respondents No.3 & 4. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- As per contention of learned Counsel appearing for respondents- Town Committee Nara, the original cheques amounting to Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) each, which were returned by the bank earlier for want of ‘Form-61’ have been encashed. The claimed amount of the petitioner as per Annexure ‘A’ (Page-11), so also financial assistance, LPR and gratuity have been paid to the petitioner; so far increase in pension as shown in Annexure ‘A’ is concerned, the petitioner may approach to concerned official of respondent-Town Committee. This petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
